_meta.source: NCAP Study Two (Apr 2024) §4; RFC 8375; DITL 2023 root-server logs.

router.reason: Common router hostname; leaks from misconfigured hosts.

gateway.reason: ISP CPE default; observed in DITL leakage.

nas.reason: NAS device local DNS label (Synology, QNAP).

wlan.reason: WLAN controller; enterprise and home leakage.

guest.reason: Guest-network SSID/DNS label on consumer routers.

iot.reason: IoT device naming; high volume in ITHI data.
